text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 32 

This variable indicates whether the beneficiary was enrolled in a Medicare Advantage (MA) plan 
during a given month. 

The 01 through 12 at the end of the variable name correspond with the month (i.e., 01 is January and 
12 is December). 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
